sprints.title: AgentForge v6.5.2 — All 9 Phases Real (Full Executive Delegation)

items.title: Implement real audit phase handler
items.description: Replace the audit phase stub with a real researcher agent dispatch that scans the codebase for issues, TODOs, and improvement opportunities and records findings in the cycle audit file. Commits: 39de05e.

items.title: Implement real plan, assign, test, review, gate, release, learn phases
items.description: Replace all remaining stub phase handlers with real agent dispatches: plan (CTO), assign (VP Eng delegation chain), test (vitest runner), review (code-reviewer agent), gate (CEO approval — can halt via GateRejectedError), release (version bump + changelog), learn (retrospective). Commits: e4374e6, 950f12c.

items.title: CEO gate can halt cycles via GateRejectedError
items.description: The gate phase now evaluates CEO agent output; if the CEO rejects the cycle (test failures, budget overrun, quality concerns), it throws GateRejectedError which aborts the remaining phases and records the rejection in the cycle log. Commits: 950f12c.

successCriteria: CEO gate can halt and record a rejected cycle
Full end-to-end cycle completes without any phase stubs
